auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in or create an account below
auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign Up
pro.title: Hazel Allure Pro
pro.subtitle: Member and practitioner subscriptions. Billed monthly or annually through Stripe.
pro.socialProof: Two subscription tiers — member pricing and course access for seekers, listing and storefront tools for practitioners.
pro.strip.memberSubtitle: Member discounts, course pricing, ratings, favorites, loyalty points, and express checkout.
pro.strip.vendorSubtitle: Unlimited listings, Teaching Sanctum, email campaigns, analytics, and international storefront links.
pro.benefit.courses: Pro member pricing in Teaching Sanctum
pro.benefit.teaching: Teaching Sanctum courses and video embeds
pro.stat1.label: Pro Member and Pro Practitioner
pro.stat2.label: Member plan starting price
pro.stat3.label: Practitioner plan starting price
pro.stat4.label: Managed in your Stripe billing portal
pro.upgrade.vendorHint: Includes unlimited listings, Teaching Sanctum, international storefront links, email campaigns, and analytics. Cancel anytime.
pro.upgrade.vendorDescription: Storefront links, courses, member discounts, analytics, and team tools for your practice.
pro.upgrade.memberDescription: Member discounts, course pricing, ratings, favorites, loyalty rewards, and express checkout.
pro.success.title: Your Pro subscription is active
pro.success.activeMessage: Your {plan} subscription is active. Included features are now available on your account.
pro.success.memberStep1: Save favorites and track loyalty points in your portal
pro.success.memberStep2: Browse Teaching Sanctum for Pro member course pricing
pro.success.vendorStep1: Add unlimited listings from your practitioner dashboard
pro.success.vendorStep2: Publish a course in Teaching Sanctum
pro.success.vendorStep3: Set member discounts and email campaigns
pro.cancel.reminder: You still have full access to browse and buy. Pro adds member pricing, loyalty rewards, and practitioner tools when you choose to subscribe.
pro.banner.compact: Storefront links, courses, analytics, email campaigns, and international links.
pro.banner.title: Upgrade to Pro Practitioner
pro.banner.subtitle: You are on the free plan. Pro Practitioner adds unlimited listings, Teaching Sanctum, member discounts, analytics, and international storefront links.
worldwide.banner: Hazel Allure supports multiple languages and regions. Change your language anytime from the header.
easyPrompt.title: Want simpler step-by-step help?
easyPrompt.body: Easy mode shows bigger tips, read-aloud, and friendly coaching when you pause.
guidance.home.title: Welcome to Hazel Allure
guidance.home.body: Not sure where to start? Here is the simplest path.
guidance.home.steps: Browse Healing Services to book practitioners.|Shop the Apothecary for ritual goods.|Explore the Teaching Sanctum for courses.
guidance.marketplace.title: Booking healing services
guidance.marketplace.body: Find a practitioner, read their profile, and book or message them.
guidance.marketplace.steps: Search or filter by category.|Use Find practitioners near you for location.|Tap a practitioner to see services and reviews.
guidance.apothecary.title: Shopping the Apothecary
guidance.apothecary.body: Oils, herbs, incense, skincare, and ritual kits from artisans worldwide.
guidance.apothecary.steps: Search by name or category.|Filter organic or dietary preferences.|Add to cart and check out when ready.
guidance.courses.title: Teaching Sanctum
guidance.courses.body: Learn from practitioners — enroll in free or paid courses.
guidance.courses.steps: Browse courses by topic.|Tap a course to see lessons and price.|Sign in to enroll — payment is secure via Stripe.
guidance.vendorDashboard.title: Your practitioner dashboard
guidance.vendorDashboard.body: Add services, apothecary goods, and manage orders here.
guidance.vendorDashboard.steps: Add a healing service or apothecary listing.|Open Teaching Sanctum to publish a course.|Check messages and orders daily.
guidance.teaching.title: Teaching Sanctum
guidance.teaching.body: Turn your knowledge into courses seekers can enroll in.
guidance.teaching.steps: Create a course with a title and description.|Add video lessons (YouTube/Vimeo links work).|Set a price or offer free enrollment.
guidance.onboarding.title: Getting started
guidance.onboarding.body: Follow these steps in order — no rush.
guidance.onboarding.steps: Set wellness preferences in Account Settings.|Browse services or the Apothecary.|Book or enroll when you find something you love.
